title: Automating board permissions from a template
excerpt: I have a top level board with an automation that creates another board based off a template.  The template has multiple users assigned to it.  The new boards that are created via automations do not have the users assigne…

posts.author: KenDags (Ken D'Agostino)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a top level board with an automation that creates another board based off a template. The template has multiple users assigned to it. The new boards that are created via automations do not have the users assigned to them. Is this a limitation or am I missing something?
